title: selaginella elegans
intro: Selaginella elegans, also known as the Spikemoss or Peacock Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella elegans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Selaginella elegans is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
